title: The era of generalists
excerpt: Going to be a slightly different post today with me recounting some of my past experiences and analyzing some of my newer ones. It’s going to be very casual and it might even leave you with nothing. This one is really just a brain dump of some of the thoughts I’ve been having recently. Every em-dash is written by yours truly.

title: Subagents and web search in Claude Code
excerpt: I recently built out ollama launch to make it easier to use Ollama with different integrations like Claude Code, OpenClaw, OpenCode, and more. I also just released subagents and web search support for Ollama’s Claude Code integration. Both now work out of the box – no MCP servers or API keys needed.

title: Use OpenClaw for free with Ollama
excerpt: I recently released ollama launch and a new TUI to make Ollama more usable.

title: Building Reliable AI Agents
excerpt: AI agents accomplish a task in a mostly unstructured manner – where they are able to reason and conduct actions to achieve a goal. The key is in providing just enough structure through tool design, harness design, and context engineering to guide the agent effectively.

title: Sampling and structured outputs in LLMs
excerpt: Sampling and structured outputs are tied together as they both determine the model’s next chosen token.
